profileDescription: Update your account's profile information and avatar
bioDescription: Brief description for your profile. Max 160 characters
websiteDescription: Your personal website or portfolio URL
privacyDescription: Control who can see your profile and posts
publicAccountDescription: Anyone can see your profile and posts
privateAccountDescription: Only approved followers can see your posts
blockedUsersDescription: Users you've blocked can't see your posts or send you messages.
mutedUsersDescription: Muted users' posts won't appear in your feed. They can still see your content.
